description: The dataset '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/NeuroticiIndex.csv' contains 2,694 participants' responses on five Neuroticism items (N1–N5) from the Big Five Inventory (Revelle, 2010), rated on a 1–6 scale. Perform a reliability analysis on all five items (N1-N5) to calculate Cronbach's α and McDonald's ω. Additionally, include the Cronbach's α (if item dropped) statistic for each item.
